questions.name: Comparch - x86: bus lock and LOCK prefix
questions.questiontext: Which x86 instruction automatically triggers a bus lock even without the LOCK prefix?

questions.name: Comparch - Computer components: Cache Memory
questions.questiontext: Which statement about cache memory is correct?

answers.text: Cache memory is always larger than main memory (RAM)
Cache memory is always smaller than main memory (RAM)
Cache memory is approximately the same size as main memory (RAM)
Cache memory is exactly the same size as main memory (RAM)
